label: Core Features
title: One Platform for Intelligent Automation
description: From document understanding to self-learning workflows and calendar-based orchestration—MIRYA automates real business processes across systems with zero code.

card1.title: Human-Level Intelligence & Zero-Code Learning
card1.description: MIRYA learns tasks by simply watching you work. It understands screens, interprets data, and builds smart automations without writing a single line of code. Just record once, and MIRYA handles the rest with human-like precision.

card2.title: Intelligent Document Processing
card2.description: Turn invoices, forms, and records into structured data using built-in AI skills—no model training required.

card3.title: Reinforcement Learning
card3.description: MIRYA autonomously improves process performance over time by learning from real outcomes and historical data.

card4.title: Extended Scheduling and Operational Control
card4.description: MIRYA’s enhanced scheduling applies to all automations. Plan, edit, and monitor workflows centrally with day, week, month, and year views.

card5.title: Secure, Scalable & Fully Yours
card5.description: Run MIRYA fully on-premise for complete data privacy. Scale across teams and customise the platform with your own branding—no hidden costs.

card6.title: Universal Compatibility
card6.description: MIRYA works on top of any app like a human—clicking, typing, and navigating visually. No APIs, no integrations, no system changes.

features.label: Features
features.title: Automation built to be powerful, secure, and reliable at every scale.
features.description: Designed to connect systems, protect data, and govern automation with enterprise-grade reliability—without adding technical complexity.

cards.title: Security & Compliance
cards.description: Built for regulated environments, MIRYA runs on Microsoft Azure and follows EU AI Act and GDPR principles by design. Role-based access, audit logs, and encryption ensure secure automation.

cards.title: Governance & Control
cards.description: Enterprise operations are supported through structured roles, permissions, versioning, backup, and monitoring dashboards with full traceability.

cards.title: Citizen Developer Enablement
cards.description: MIRYA empowers business users to automate their own processes without coding using reusable templates and best-practice training.
